mapper.select: /* 배포된 아이템 파일 정보 조회 */ SELECT fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath , fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileOrgNm , fileInfo.USE_END_YMD AS endDate , TO_CHAR(req.APPROVAL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS purchaserAppDate , FN_GET_CD_NM('businessTypeCd', reqMap.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS businessTypeNm , FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', reqMap.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS distributeTypeNm , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = reqDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS requestUserNm , FN_GET_CD_NM('requestPurpose', req.REQUEST_PURPOSE, #{sessionLang}) AS requestPurpose , fileInfo.PRINT_COUNT AS printCount , fileInfo.DESTROY_TYPE AS destroyType /* 폐기구분 */ , COALESCE(fileInfo.DESTROY_STATUS_CD, '0') AS destroyStatusCd /* 폐기상태 */ FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMap ON fileInfo.REQUEST_NO = reqMap.REQUEST_NO AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = reqMap.OBJECT_ID JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMap.REQUEST_NO LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqDtl ON reqDtl.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO AND reqDtl.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' WHERE req.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND fileInfo.FILE_NO = #{fileNo}

SELECT FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath , FILE_NM AS fileNm , ORG_FILE_NM AS fileOrgNm
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW_FILE
WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND FILE_NO = #{fileNo}

SELECT fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath , fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileOrgNm , CASE WHEN fileInfo.USE_START_YMD IS NULL THEN req.USE_START_YMD ELSE fileInfo.USE_START_YMD END AS deployDt , CASE WHEN fileInfo.USE_END_YMD IS NULL THEN req.USE_START_YMD ELSE fileInfo.USE_END_YMD END AS endDate , TO_CHAR(req.APPROVAL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS purchaserAppDate , FN_GET_CD_NM('businessTypeCd', reqMap.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS businessTypeNm , FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', reqMap.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS distributeTypeNm , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = reqDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS requestUserNm , FN_GET_CD_NM('requestPurpose', req.REQUEST_PURPOSE, #{sessionLang}) AS requestPurpose , fileInfo.PRINT_COUNT AS printCount , fileInfo.DESTROY_TYPE AS destroyType /* 폐기구분 */ , COALESCE(fileInfo.DESTROY_STATUS_CD, '0') AS destroyStatusCd /* 폐기상태 */ , req.PROTECT_YN AS protectYn FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMap ON fileInfo.REQUEST_NO = reqMap.REQUEST_NO AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = reqMap.OBJECT_ID JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMap.REQUEST_NO LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqDtl ON reqDtl.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO AND reqDtl.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' WHERE req.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND fileInfo.FILE_NO = #{fileNo}

SELECT fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath , fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileOrgNm , CASE WHEN fileInfo.USE_START_YMD IS NULL THEN req.USE_START_YMD ELSE fileInfo.USE_START_YMD END AS deployDt , CASE WHEN fileInfo.USE_END_YMD IS NULL THEN req.USE_START_YMD ELSE fileInfo.USE_END_YMD END AS endDate , TO_CHAR(req.APPROVAL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS purchaserAppDate , FN_GET_CD_NM('businessTypeCd', reqMap.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS businessTypeNm , FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', reqMap.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS distributeTypeNm , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = reqDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS requestUserNm , FN_GET_CD_NM('requestPurpose', req.REQUEST_PURPOSE, #{sessionLang}) AS requestPurpose , fileInfo.PRINT_COUNT AS printCount , fileInfo.DESTROY_TYPE AS destroyType /* 폐기구분 */ , COALESCE(fileInfo.DESTROY_STATUS_CD, '0') AS destroyStatusCd /* 폐기상태 */ , req.PROTECT_YN AS protectYn FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMap ON fileInfo.REQUEST_NO = reqMap.REQUEST_NO AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = reqMap.OBJECT_ID JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMap.REQUEST_NO LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqDtl ON reqDtl.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO AND reqDtl.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' WHERE req.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}

SELECT ( SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER tmp WHERE tmp.USER_CD = destroyReq.INSERT_USER_CD ) AS destroyRequestUserNm FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping LEFT JOIN DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_MAPPING destroyMapping ON destroyMapping.REQUEST_NO = mapping.REQUEST_NO AND destroyMapping.OBJECT_ID = mapping.OBJECT_ID LEFT JOIN DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyReq ON destroyReq.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyMapping.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND mapping.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} ORDER BY mapping.REQUEST_NO DESC

SELECT ITEM_CD AS itemCd , ITEM_NAME AS itemNm , ITEM_DESC AS itemDesc , ITEM_TYPE AS itemType , ITEM_INFO AS itemInfo , ITEM_H_ALIGN AS itemHAlign , ITEM_V_ALIGN As itemVAlign , ITEM_SIZE AS itemSize , ITEM_TRANSPARENCY AS itemTransparency , ITEM_FONT AS itemFont , ITEM_COLOR AS itemColor , ITEM_FONT_STYLE AS itemFontStyle FROM DOCS_WATERMARK_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD IN ( SELECT ITEM_CD FROM DOCS_WATERMARK_MAPPING WHERE WATERMARK_CD = (SELECT WATERMARK_CD FROM DOCS_WATERMARK_INFO WHERE USER_TYPE = #{userType} AND WATERMARK_TYPE = #{watermarkType}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_REQUEST_FILE SET PRINT_COUNT = PRINT_COUNT + 1 WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND OBJECT_ID IN (${objectId})
